title: Ian McKellen ‘Fell in Love With’ Johnny Depp on ‘Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol’ Set: ‘He’s in Spankingly Good Form’
content:
ByAntonio Ferme

Sir Ian McKellen says he “fell in love with”Johnny Deppafter working together on “Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol.”

“He’s in spankingly good form,” McKellen toldVarietyon Wednesday evening at “The Christophers” New York premiere. “Effervescent, funny, irreverent, serious — all at the same time. It was a bit of a love fest, really. I fell in love with him. He’s very obliging to his fellow actors. [There was] a wonderful feeling on the set.”

Depp stars as Ebenezer Scrooge in the remake, marking his first major Hollywood role in nearly eight years. He last appeared in 2018’s “Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald” and waslater removedfrom the franchise afterlosing a libel case against The Sun, which labeled him a “wife beater” following allegations by ex-wife Amber Heard. After a U.S. juryfoundin 2022 that both Depp and Heard defamed each other.

Since then, Depp has appeared in several independent films overseas, including “Minamata” and “Jeanne du Barry.” His next film, the Marc Webb-directed “Day Drinker” with Penélope Cruz, is expected to release later this year.

Ti West’s reimagining of “Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol” also stars Rupert Grint as Bob Cratchit, Andrea Riseborough as the Ghost of Christmas Past, Tramell Tillman as the Ghost of Christmas Present and McKellen as Jacob Marley.

“It was only six days, but it was well worth it,” McKellen said. “I play a ghost! [chuckles]”

McKellen is currently promoting Steven Soderbergh’s dark comedy “The Christophers,” in which he stars alongside Michaela Coel and James Corden. He plays a once-renowned English painter whose estranged children hire a forger (Coel) to pose as his assistant and complete his unfinished works to sell after his death.

“I don’t really connect my life with his, except that he’s getting old — and I am old,” McKellen said. “The future is uncertain- but no, it’s certain. I’m going to die. And that hovers over his life and kids’ expectations of what might happen when he dies. Will they or will they not inherit paintings they can sell? I just had a ball.”

“The Christophers” opens in theaters April 10.
title_zh: 伊恩·麥克連(Ian McKellen)在《艾比尼澤：聖誕頌歌》(Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol)的拍攝現場表示他「愛上了」約翰尼·德普(Johnny Depp)，並稱讚對方「狀態極佳」。
content_zh:
安東尼·費爾梅(Antonio Ferme)

伊恩·麥克連(Sir Ian McKellen)表示，他在與約翰尼·德普(Johnny Depp)合作《艾比尼澤：聖誕頌歌(Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol)》後“愛上了”對方。

“他狀態非常好，”麥克連在週三晚上的《基督徒(The Christophers)》紐約首映式上告訴《綜藝(Variety)》。 “活潑、有趣、不拘一格、嚴肅——同時具備所有特質。這真是一場愛的盛宴。我愛上了他。他對同伴演員非常友善。[片場]的氛圍非常美好。”

德普在這部重拍作品中飾演艾比尼澤·斯克魯奇(Ebenezer Scrooge)，這是他近八年來的首個重大好萊塢角色。他最後一次出現在2018年的《神奇動物：格林德沃之罪(Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald)》，之後因為對《太陽報(The Sun)》提起的誹謗案敗訴而被逐出該系列，該報將他標籤為“家暴者”，這是基於前妻安柏·赫德(Amber Heard)的指控。2022年，美國陪審團裁定德普和赫德互相誹謗。

自那以後，德普在海外參演了幾部獨立電影，包括《水俁(Minamata)》和《珍·杜·巴里(Jeanne du Barry)》。他下一部電影是由馬克·韋布(Marc Webb)執導，與佩內洛普·克魯茲(Penélope Cruz)合作的《白天飲酒(Day Drinker)》，預計將於今年晚些時候上映。

提·韋斯(Ti West)重新詮釋的《艾比尼澤：聖誕頌歌(Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol)》還主演了魯伯特·格林特(Rupert Grint)飾演鮑勃·克拉奇特(Bob Cratchit)、安德莉亞·賴斯伯勒(Andrea Riseborough)飾演過去的聖誕鬼魂、特拉梅爾·蒂爾曼(Tramell Tillman)飾演現在的聖誕鬼魂，以及麥克連飾演雅各·馬利(Jacob Marley)。

“這只有六天，但非常值得，”麥克連說。“我飾演一個鬼魂！[笑]”

麥克連目前正在宣傳史蒂文·索德伯格(Steven Soderbergh)的黑色喜劇《基督徒(The Christophers)》，他在片中與米凱拉·考爾(Michaela Coel)和詹姆斯·科登(James Corden)共同演出。他飾演一位曾經著名的英國畫家，他的疏遠子女雇用一名偽造者(考爾)假裝成他的助手，完成他未完成的作品，以便在他去世後出售。

“我並不真的將我的生活與他的生活聯繫起來，除了他變老了——而我也老了，”麥克連說。“未來是不確定的——但不，這是確定的。我會死。而這個事實籠罩著他的生活和孩子們對他去世後可能發生的期待。他們會不會繼承可以出售的畫作？我真的玩得很開心。”

《基督徒(The Christophers)》將於4月10日在電影院上映。
summary_zh:
安東尼·費爾梅(Antonio Ferme)

伊恩·麥克連(Sir Ian McKellen)表示，他在與約翰尼·德普(Johnny Depp)合作《艾比尼澤：聖誕頌歌(Ebenezer: A Christmas Carol)》後“愛上了”對方。

“他狀態非常好，”麥克連在週三晚上的《基督徒(The Christophers)》紐約首映式上告訴《綜藝(Variety)》。
